Jessica Taylor
Phoenix, AZ

Summary
Dedicated and detail-oriented warehouse professional with over 4 years of experience in fast-paced environments. Proven ability to efficiently pick and pack orders while maintaining accuracy and meeting tight deadlines. Strong physical stamina, comfortable standing for extended periods and lifting heavy items. Committed to enhancing operational efficiency and ensuring customer satisfaction.

Experience
Warehouse Associate  
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2021 - Present  
- Operate in a high-volume warehouse environment, accurately picking and packing up to 200 orders per shift.  
- Maintain a clean and organized workspace, contributing to overall safety and efficiency.  
- Collaborate with team members to streamline processes and reduce order fulfillment time by 15%.  
- Conduct regular inventory checks and assist in replenishment to ensure stock availability.  

Picker/Packer  
XYZ Distribution Center, Tempe, AZ  
January 2019 - May 2021  
- Successfully managed the picking and packing of various products while ensuring compliance with quality standards.  
- Lifted packages weighing up to 50 lbs and maintained a fast-paced workflow, consistently meeting daily targets.  
- Utilized warehouse management systems to track inventory levels and order statuses.
